name: directus
title: Directus
description: Open-source headless CMS and data platform — wraps any SQL database in a realtime REST/GraphQL API and a no-code admin app for managing content

defaultEnv.description: Unique per-install project identifier used for caching and internal signing. Keep it stable across restarts. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32
Secret used to sign access tokens (sessions). Required — if it changes, all issued tokens are invalidated. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

Password for the first admin account. Optional — leave blank and it defaults to your SECRET value (a strong, unique per-install random), so the local admin is a secure break-glass login you can look up later. Set one only if you want a memorable local password.
